top_signals.title: Finance App Network Maker Plaid Is Said to Consider US IPO
top_signals.summary: Plaid Inc., a technology company whose network helps fintech apps connect to customer accounts, is considering an initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
